top_signals.title: The chip and memory stock frenzy

top_signals.title: Exclusive: Senior Ukrainian commander sees imminent 'turning point' in war - Reuters

top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dell shares jump 25% after server maker reports fastest sales growth since return to public market in 2018
top_signals.summary: Dell has gone from being a sleepy legacy tech company to a high-growth AI story, assembling servers packed with graphics processing units.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Okta jumps 9%, tops first-quarter results on agentic AI demand
top_signals.summary: CEO Todd McKinnon said Okta is "playing a long game" on AI and is allocating more resources to agentic tools.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Argentina bill targets crypto payments to illegal gambling sites
top_signals.summary: Argentina’s proposed online gambling bill would restrict banks, payment firms and crypto providers from serving unauthorized betting platforms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ABS Releases Nuclear-Ready Notation for Marine, Offshore Assets
top_signals.summary: ABS announced the release of the ABS Nuclear-Ready Notation, an industry first classification notation for marine and offshore assets designed to support future conversion to nuclear energy.The notation is featured in the latest ABS document…
